title: Macdonald Edinburgh Electrical | Solar, battery and electrical, Penicuik
description: Solar panels, battery storage and electrical work across Penicuik, Midlothian and south Edinburgh. David fits solar and battery systems, upgrades consumer units and wires for induction hobs and EV chargers, finished tidy and neatly labelled. Rated 4.9 on Google from 63 reviews.
